canvas_rendering.description: HTML5 Canvas setup with DPR correction. 640x360 native at 2x scale.

pixel_font_renderer.description: Custom bitmap font rendering. Do not replace with canvas fillText.
pixel_font_renderer.entry_function: drawText(ctx, text, x, y, color, scale)

tile_movement.description: Grid-based movement with eased interpolation. Arrow keys + WASD.

hud_display.description: Top-of-screen HUD showing Day, Cash, MRR, Runway, AP.

character_creation.description: Role selection screen. Three choices: Seller, Dev, Marketer.

dialogue_system.description: NPC dialogue with branching responses. Bottom-of-screen dialogue box.

action_point_system.description: 5 AP per day. Activities cost 1-3 AP. AP shown in HUD.

email_inbox.description: Morning email phase. 2-5 emails per day. Player reads and responds.

npc_interaction.description: Walk to NPC, press action key, trigger dialogue.

economy_tick.description: Daily revenue/expense calculation. MRR, burn, runway.

location_transitions.description: Move between locations via door tiles. Fade transition.

asset_preloader.description: Load PNG assets before game loop starts. Fallback to rectangles.
